creator: romain@blogreen.org
text:
Justed updated the BSD# repository from 2.12.7.

This patch seems okay! Let's commit it (and stop F-spot from crashing
every once a while with some strange message ... or maybe it is a
coincidence).

We just have to take care that the maintainer address is kept to
mono@FreeBSD.org since I completely failed to get informed about this PR
before finding it looking for something else.

Romain

-- 
Romain Tartière <romain@blogreen.org>        http://romain.blogreen.org/
